mapper.select: SELECT * FROM account_subject WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY subject_code
SELECT * FROM account_subject WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY subject_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_subject (subject_code, subject_name, parent_id, balance_direction, level, is_leaf, status) VALUES (#{subjectCode}, #{subjectName}, #{parentId}, #{balanceDirection}, #{level}, #{isLeaf}, #{status})
